UI_ABR_EBS_01_L01: This is an automated Emergency Broadcast System transmission. This is not a test.
UI_ABR_EBS_01_L02: All citizens in Knox County are ordered to evacuate immediately.
UI_ABR_EBS_01_L03: Proceed to the nearest military checkpoint for processing and evacuation.
UI_ABR_EBS_01_L04: Do not attempt to aid infected individuals. Repeat: do not approach the infected.
UI_ABR_EBS_02_L01: Attention: the exclusion zone has been expanded to cover all of Knox County.
UI_ABR_EBS_02_L02: Military forces have established a perimeter. Unauthorized exit will be met with lethal force.
UI_ABR_EBS_03_L01: Emergency supply drops have been scheduled for designated areas.
UI_ABR_EBS_03_L02: Citizens are advised to approach supply zones only during daylight hours.
UI_ABR_EBS_03_L03: Supplies are limited. Priority will be given to families with children and the elderly.
UI_ABR_EBS_04_L02: This station is no longer broadcasting live content.
UI_ABR_EBS_04_L03: If you are hearing this, this is an automated emergency message.
UI_ABR_EBS_04_L04: Stay indoors. Barricade all entry points. Do not open the door for anyone.
UI_ABR_EBS_05_L01: To anyone still listening out there...
UI_ABR_EBS_05_L02: The evacuation centers have been overrun. Louisville has... Louisville is gone.
UI_ABR_EBS_05_L03: We are the last broadcast tower still operational in the region.
UI_ABR_EBS_05_L04: If you can hear this, head north. There may still be survivors near the lake.
UI_ABR_EBS_05_L05: May God have mercy on us all.
UI_ABR_EBS_06_L01: ALERT: Containment has failed at multiple checkpoints along the southern perimeter.
UI_ABR_EBS_06_L02: All personnel are to fall back to Rally Point Echo.
UI_ABR_EBS_06_L03: Civilian evacuation is no longer possible. Shelter in place immediately.
UI_ABR_EBS_06_L04: This is the last update from Central Command.
UI_ABR_GHO_01_L02: Repeat: seven... seven... three... nine... two...
UI_ABR_GHO_01_L03: ... the door is open... the door is open...
UI_ABR_GHO_02_L01: Can you hear me? ... Is someone there?
UI_ABR_GHO_02_L02: Mommy said not to go outside. But mommy doesn't talk anymore.
UI_ABR_GHO_02_L03: The man at the window... he's still there... he's always there...
UI_ABR_GHO_03_L03: DO NOT TUNE TO THIS FREQUENCY AGAIN
UI_ABR_GHO_04_L02: You checked the locks, didn't you? ... Good.
UI_ABR_GHO_04_L03: But it won't matter. They're already inside.
UI_ABR_GHO_07_L01: We've been watching you for a long time.
UI_ABR_GHO_07_L02: You're doing so well. So resourceful. So alone.
UI_ABR_GHO_07_L03: Don't worry. You won't be alone for much longer.
UI_ABR_APO_01_L01: This is Radio Apocalipse, broadcasting from an undisclosed location.
UI_ABR_APO_01_L02: To all survivors in the Knox County region: you are not alone.
UI_ABR_APO_01_L03: We broadcast daily with survival tips, safe zone updates, and community news.
UI_ABR_APO_01_L04: Stay strong. Stay human. Stay alive.
UI_ABR_APO_02_L01: Attention survivors: significant horde activity spotted near the warehouse district.
UI_ABR_APO_02_L02: Avoid West Point downtown area for the next 48 hours.
UI_ABR_APO_02_L03: Supply runs should be redirected to rural areas east of Muldraugh.
UI_ABR_APO_03_L01: Good news from the northern settlements.
UI_ABR_APO_03_L02: A group of survivors has established a fortified position near the lake.
UI_ABR_APO_03_L03: They are accepting new members. Look for the green signal fires at night.
UI_ABR_APO_04_L01: WARNING: Armed groups have been spotted moving along the main highway.
UI_ABR_APO_04_L02: They are hostile. Repeat: engage only if necessary.
UI_ABR_APO_04_L03: Travel in groups and avoid main roads after dark.
UI_ABR_APO_05_L02: I know it's hard. I know you've lost people. We all have.
UI_ABR_APO_05_L03: But every day you wake up is a victory against this nightmare.
UI_ABR_APO_05_L04: This is Radio Apocalipse, reminding you: we survive together, or not at all.
UI_ABR_APO_06_L01: Mayday, mayday! This is a distress call from a group of four survivors.
UI_ABR_APO_06_L02: We are trapped on the second floor of the Crossroads Mall.
UI_ABR_APO_06_L03: We have wounded and are running low on supplies.
UI_ABR_APO_06_L04: If anyone can hear this, please... we need help.
UI_ABR_MIL_01_L01: Alpha-Seven to Command. Requesting extraction at grid reference Delta-Four-Niner.
UI_ABR_MIL_01_L02: Negative, Alpha-Seven. All extraction assets have been reassigned to Louisville.
UI_ABR_MIL_01_L03: Command, we have civilian survivors. Requesting immediate support—
UI_ABR_MIL_02_L01: Foxtrot-Actual to all units. Containment breach at Sector Nine.
UI_ABR_MIL_02_L02: Recommend immediate fallback to secondary perimeter.
UI_ABR_MIL_02_L03: Authorization code: BROKEN ARROW. Repeat: BROKEN ARROW.
UI_ABR_MIL_02_L04: All personnel withdraw immediately. This is not a drill.
UI_ABR_MIL_03_L01: Whiskey-Tango. Payload delivered at designated coordinates.
UI_ABR_MIL_03_L03: This channel will go silent in T-minus three minutes.
UI_ABR_MIL_03_L04: God forgive us for what we've done.
UI_ABR_MIL_04_L01: This is Sergeant Morrison, 3rd Battalion, 24th Infantry.
UI_ABR_MIL_04_L02: We are cut off from the main force. Down to four personnel.
UI_ABR_MIL_04_L03: If anyone receives this... we are holding position at the school on Oak Street.
UI_ABR_MIL_04_L04: Ammunition is critical. We will not last another night.
UI_ABR_MIL_05_L01: To any military personnel still monitoring this frequency:
UI_ABR_MIL_05_L02: Operation DEADLIGHT has been declared a total failure.
UI_ABR_MIL_05_L03: The chain of command has been dissolved. You are hereby released from duty.
UI_ABR_MIL_05_L04: Go home, soldier. Find your family, if you still can.
UI_ABR_MIL_05_L05: This is the last official military broadcast. Central Command, signing off.
